---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like

A clear description of the feature or improvement you want to see.

## Why this matters

What problem does this solve? Who would benefit? If possible, describe a concrete scenario.

## How you think it should work

Rough sketch of the CLI command, config option, or output change you have in mind.

```bash
# example CLI usage if relevant
aeo-tracker …
```

## Alternatives you considered

Any workarounds you tried, or other tools that solve this differently.

## Is this on the roadmap?

Check the Roadmap section in the README before filing — if it is already planned, feel free to 👍 this issue to signal priority instead of opening a new one.
